---
title: "Energy Data Analysis"
format: html
---

# рҹ“Ҡ Energy Data Analysis

This project analyzes energy consumption data using an object-oriented pipeline.

---

## рҹ§ұ OOP Structure

- `DataLoader` вҶ’ loads dataset  
- `DataProcessor` вҶ’ cleans and transforms data  
- `Visualizer` вҶ’ creates plots  
- `AnalysisApp` вҶ’ orchestrates workflow  

---

## в–¶пёҸ Example


```{python}
import sys
import os

sys.path.append(os.path.abspath(os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "..", "..")))
from projects.data_analysis.analysis_app import AnalysisApp

app = AnalysisApp("data_analysis/data/file.csv")
df = app.run()

df.head()
```

## рҹ“Ҳ Visualization

```{python}
from projects.data_analysis.visualizer import Visualizer
from IPython.display import HTML

viz = Visualizer(df)
HTML(viz.to_html())
```
